name: Atlanta AutoStar
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership in the Atlanta area offering in-house financing for customers with bad credit or no credit history.
description_long:
Atlanta AutoStar is a family-owned Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) dealership based in Scottdale, Georgia, that has been operating continuously since 2004. The company specializes in serving customers in the greater Atlanta metropolitan area, including Decatur, Clarkston, Stone Mountain, and Lithonia. They market themselves as a solution for consumers who have been rejected by traditional auto financing due to poor or absent credit histories.

The company's core offering is in-house vehicle financing paired with used car sales. They advertise approvals for "all credit situations," low down payments, and a streamlined pre-approval process using a soft credit check. Their inventory consists of used sedans, SUVs, trucks, and vans, with specific examples shown ranging from 2013 to 2017 model years. Customers can apply online, schedule test drives, and make payments through their website portal.

Atlanta AutoStar differentiates itself through bundled protection offerings, including a 24-month/24,000-mile service contract, GAP (Guaranteed Asset Protection) insurance, and title pawn services. They emphasize their family ownership and claim to have helped "thousands of customers" over 20 years, with customer testimonials and a referral program featured on their site. Business hours are 10 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday, closed weekends.

As a BHPH dealer, this company operates in a high-risk lending segment where loan terms, interest rates, and repossession practices are often opaque to consumers. While the website emphasizes convenience and inclusivity, BHPH financing typically carries significantly higher effective interest rates than traditional auto loans and GPS tracking on vehicles. No specific pricing, APR, or payment terms are disclosed on the website, which is a common practice in this industry but raises transparency concerns.
pros: Advertises soft credit check pre-approval process with no hard inquiry upfront
Offers bundled benefits including 24-month/24,000-mile service warranty, GAP insurance, and title pawn services
In-house financing eliminates need for third-party lender approval
Low down payment options explicitly mentioned for budget-constrained buyers
Online application and payment portal with appointment scheduling available
Claims 20+ years of continuous operation and family ownership model
Serves multiple suburban Atlanta communities with established local presence
cons: No APR, interest rates, or specific payment terms disclosed anywhere on website
BHPH model typically includes GPS tracking and odometer monitoring, limiting vehicle freedom
Title pawn offering suggests aggressive collection practices common in BHPH industry
No customer reviews or ratings visible despite claims of positive reputation
Limited vehicle inventory shown (4 examples) with mileage ranging 119K–164K miles
Closed on weekends, limiting accessibility for working customers
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional auto loans
Buyers needing immediate vehicle access without months of financing approval delays
Customers in the greater Atlanta area seeking local, in-person dealership relationships
Low-income earners prioritizing low down payment requirements over total cost of ownership
diagnosis: Atlanta AutoStar is best suited for consumers with damaged credit or no credit history who need immediate vehicle access and prioritize approval speed over total cost. The primary caveat is that BHPH financing operates in a segment with significantly higher effective interest rates and stricter vehicle monitoring than traditional auto loans; consumers should carefully review all terms before signing, as annual percentage rates and total payment obligations are not disclosed on the website.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house auto financing
Used vehicle sales (sedans, SUVs, trucks, vans)
Online pre-approval with soft credit check
Online payment portal and account management
Bad credit and no credit auto financing

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: AutoStar Finance, Inc - D/B/A Atlanta AutoStar
